title: Youtube Poop: Imperial Guard Stronghold Assault
description: The Kronus 1st Regiment 5th Company brings light to General Alexander's lair one day and he condemns them all to death.  When one soldier objects, Commissar Bison kills him and remarks on how delicious it was.  General Alexander then makes a rather pointless speech to the enemies of Mama Luigi, having been blessed with lamp oil, rope, and bombs beforehand.
